results.title: Michigan Gov. Gretchen Whitmer's chief of staff is departing
results.description: LANSING, Mich. — Michigan Gov. Gretchen Whitmer announced Friday that her longtime chief of staff, JoAnne Huls, will be departing the key role in state government at the end of the month. Huls has been a fixture within the Whitmer...

results.title: Michigan’s el Sayed tells supporters to stop making fun of Stevens
results.description: Michigan candidate Abdul el Sayed on Friday urged his supporters to stop “making fun” of his rival in the race for the state’s Democratic Senate nomination, telling progressives to focus on the issues instead. Democratic voters are choosing between el Sayed, who is backed by socialists, and Rep. Haley Stevens (D-MI), a comparatively centrist establishment-backed [...] The post Michigan’s el Sayed tells supporters to stop making fun of Stevens appeared first on CBNC .

results.title: Victoria Gotti’s Son Wants Prison Pushed Back Days Before Surrender
results.description: Victoria Gotti‘s son, Carmine Agnello, has urged the court to push back his prison sentence so he can donate a kidney to his mother, who is living with chronic kidney disease. Days before he was supposed to surrender, Agnello asked for a delay in the latest filing. results.title: Oneida County Sheriffs introduce new K9 Officer
results.description: In a press conference at the Oneida County Sheriff's Office on Friday, Sheriff Robert Maciol introduced the newest officer of the four-legged variety.

results.title: Disgraced Politician Jeffrey Donaldson Appeals Convictions
FCC Commissioner Slams Trump’s Attack on Broadcasters Not Taking His Speech: ‘Naked Attempt to Bully’
results.description: "The FCC has no authority to punish a station for refusing to air a blatantly political speech.
